text: Lá no mar profundo, um peixe enorme nadava em silêncio. Mas esta história começa bem longe da água.
image_prompt: Vast deep blue ocean under a dramatic dawn sky, a colossal gentle whale silhouette gliding beneath the surface, volumetric sun rays piercing the water, layered waves in foreground midground and background, cinematic scale and wonder
motion_prompt: The camera drifts slowly over the ocean surface as the whale silhouette glides underneath, soft light rays shift through the water, waves roll with natural secondary motion
vfx: volumetric god-rays through water and soft bioluminescent particles
sfx: deep ocean ambience, distant whale call, gentle surface waves

text: Jonas morava numa terra quente e seca. Ele gostava de paz, de sombra e de caminhos conhecidos.
image_prompt: Sunbaked ancient Hebrew hillside village at golden hour, Jonah standing alone on a dusty path with his satchel, olive trees and stone houses in midground, warm desert mountains far away, strong silhouette and depth
motion_prompt: Gentle tracking shot follows Jonah walking the dusty path, cloth and satchel sway naturally, heat haze shimmers in the distance
sfx: dry wind, distant birds, soft footsteps on dust

text: Se Deus me deixar quieto por aqui, eu fico bem. Eu gosto do meu lugar e da minha rotina.
image_prompt: Medium shot of Jonah resting under an olive tree, soft smile turning slightly stubborn, satchel beside him, warm afternoon light on his face, village rooftops softly blurred behind him
motion_prompt: Jonah settles against the tree, looks toward the village with a small stubborn smile, leaves rustle gently around him
sfx: olive leaves rustling, distant village chatter, soft cloth movement

text: Mas um dia a voz de Deus chegou até ele. Não era um grito. Era um chamado claro e firme.
image_prompt: Close-up of Jonah looking upward with sudden alertness, warm volumetric light falling across his face and shoulders, olive leaves glowing at the edges, intimate emotional framing
motion_prompt: Jonah lifts his eyes as warm light blooms across his face, his expression shifts from calm to startled attention
vfx: soft volumetric divine light bloom across the frame
sfx: wind hush, soft resonant tone, cloth shift

text: Jonas, levante-se. Vá até a grande cidade de Nínive e anuncie a minha mensagem ao povo.
image_prompt: Low-angle view of Jonah standing in a shaft of warm golden light looking upward, no human figure for God, glowing sky and drifting dust motes, reverent cinematic composition
motion_prompt: The light shaft intensifies while Jonah listens with a tense face, dust motes swirl slowly in the beam
vfx: intensifying golden light shaft and floating luminous dust
sfx: deep warm resonant presence, soft wind, distant thunder roll

text: Nínive era uma cidade enorme e perigosa. Jonas ficou com medo. E também ficou com raiva no coração.
image_prompt: Over-shoulder shot of Jonah staring toward a distant dark city silhouette on the horizon, stormy amber sky, his shoulders tense, dusty road stretching into depth
motion_prompt: Camera holds over Jonah's shoulder as the distant city silhouette shimmers in heat, his shoulders tighten and he turns away
sfx: distant city murmur, uneasy wind, satchel strap creak

text: Nínive? Eu não quero ir até lá. Eles não merecem uma chance de Deus!
image_prompt: Close-up of Jonah looking away with stubborn worry under olive trees, soft stylized animated face, warm golden light, Disney Pixar character look.
motion_prompt: Jonah shakes his head once, clenches his jaw, then looks aside with conflicted stubbornness
sfx: sharp breath, cloth rustle, tense silence under soft wind

text: Então Jonas fez uma escolha errada. Em vez de subir para Nínive, ele desceu correndo para o porto.
image_prompt: Wide shot of a busy ancient port at Joppa, wooden ships and ropes in foreground, Jonah hurrying down stone steps toward the docks, merchants and crates in midground, sea glittering beyond
motion_prompt: Jonah rushes down the stone steps toward the docks, camera tracks with him through ropes and crates, harbor activity moves naturally around him
sfx: harbor bustle, gulls, wooden crates, footsteps on stone

text: Tem um barco saindo daqui? Eu preciso ir bem longe. O mais longe possível desta terra.
image_prompt: Tracking medium shot of Jonah speaking urgently to a weathered ship captain beside a wooden vessel, ropes and sails framing them, busy dock workers blurred behind, clear character separation
motion_prompt: Jonah approaches the captain and speaks quickly, the captain turns with a raised brow, ropes sway and water laps against the hull
sfx: creaking dock wood, water lapping, distant sailors calling

text: Tem sim. Este barco vai para Társis. Mas o mar hoje parece inquieto e pesado.
image_prompt: Medium two-shot of the captain gesturing toward a large wooden ship while Jonah looks eager and nervous, sails half-raised, cloudy sky reflecting on the water, rich dockside detail
motion_prompt: The captain points to the ship, Jonah nods quickly and climbs aboard, sails flutter and the deck shifts underfoot
sfx: sail canvas flap, rope pull, hull creak, soft wave slap

text: Jonas pagou a passagem, entrou no barco e se escondeu lá embaixo. Ele queria fugir de Deus.
image_prompt: Aerial view of a wooden ship leaving the harbor into open sea, tiny figure of Jonah disappearing below deck, coastline shrinking behind, soft late-day light on the water
motion_prompt: The ship pulls away from harbor as the camera rises, Jonah disappears below deck, wake trails across the water
vfx: soft sea spray mist along the wake
sfx: ship leaving harbor, gulls fading, deep hull ambience

text: Mas ninguém foge de Deus. No meio do caminho, o vento mudou de verdade. O céu ficou escuro.
image_prompt: Extreme-wide stormy seascape, towering dark clouds over a tiny wooden ship, violent waves rising like walls, cold blue and slate color script, terrifying scale kept family-friendly
motion_prompt: Massive waves rise around the tiny ship as the camera pushes through spray, clouds churn and lightning flickers far away
vfx: volumetric storm clouds, distant lightning, heavy rain sheets and sea spray
sfx: rising wind, thunder roll, heavy rain, crashing waves

text: Segurem as cordas com força! Esta tempestade não é comum. Alguém precisa orar agora!
image_prompt: Low-angle deck shot of the captain shouting orders in driving rain, sailors gripping ropes behind him, tilted mast and whipping sails, water streaming across wood planks
motion_prompt: The deck pitches hard as the captain shouts and grips a rope, rain lashes sideways, sails whip violently
vfx: rain streaks, water spray bursts, lightning flash reflections on wet wood
sfx: shouting through wind, rope strain, thunder crack, deck splash

text: Enquanto todos lutavam no convés, Jonas dormia no porão. O medo dos outros não o acordava.
image_prompt: Dim below-deck cabin where Jonah sleeps curled on cargo sacks, lantern swinging, water dripping through boards, storm motion felt through the room, intimate and tense
motion_prompt: The lantern swings with the ship's roll while Jonah sleeps, water drips, cargo shifts slightly around him
vfx: swinging lantern light and dripping water droplets
sfx: muffled storm above, creaking hull, dripping water, soft snore

text: Jonas, acorde agora! Como você consegue dormir? Levante e peça ajuda ao seu Deus!
image_prompt: Close two-shot of the soaked captain shaking Jonah awake in the dim cabin, urgent faces, swinging lantern light, water on their clothes, strong emotional contrast
motion_prompt: The captain shakes Jonah awake, Jonah sits up startled, lantern light swings across their wet faces
sfx: urgent footsteps on wood, cloth grab, sudden gasp, storm muffled above

text: A culpa é minha. Eu estou fugindo do Senhor. Joguem-me no mar e a tempestade vai parar.
image_prompt: Over-shoulder from the captain toward Jonah confessing on the storm-lashed deck, rain on Jonah's face, terrified sailors behind, dramatic rim light from lightning
motion_prompt: Jonah speaks with guilt and courage mixed, rain streaks his face, sailors react with shock behind him
vfx: lightning rim light flashes across wet faces
sfx: heavy rain, distant thunder, shocked murmurs, rope slap

text: Os marinheiros não queriam fazer aquilo. Eles remaram com toda a força. Mas o mar só piorava.
image_prompt: Wide deck shot of sailors rowing desperately while the captain holds Jonah back from the rail, enormous wave rising behind the ship, rain and spray everywhere, clear action staging
motion_prompt: Sailors heave at oars as a huge wave rises behind the ship, the captain pulls Jonah back, spray explodes across the deck
vfx: towering wave crest, explosive sea spray and rain sheets
sfx: oars straining, wave roar, shouted effort, hull slam

text: Façam o que eu pedi. Eu sei que esta tempestade veio por minha causa.
image_prompt: Extreme close-up of Jonah's wet stylized face in the storm, large expressive animated eyes, simplified rain streaks, Disney Pixar look, not photoreal.
motion_prompt: Jonah blinks through rain, steadies his breath, and nods once with quiet resolve
vfx: tiny rain droplets catching lightning reflections
sfx: close rain hits, soft breath, distant thunder

text: Então eles jogaram Jonas no mar. Na mesma hora, as águas começaram a se acalmar.
image_prompt: Wide cinematic splash as Jonah falls into dark stormy water beside the ship, sailors watching from the rail, rain still falling but waves beginning to soften, dramatic yet non-graphic
motion_prompt: Jonah hits the water in a big splash, the camera follows the impact, then the surrounding waves gradually settle
vfx: explosive splash, settling wave energy, rain thinning into mist
sfx: body splash, sudden wave hush, rain softening, relieved gasps

text: Lá embaixo, na escuridão da água, algo enorme se aproximou. Um grande peixe abriu a boca.
image_prompt: Underwater POV looking into deep blue-black water as a colossal gentle whale approaches with mouth opening, shafts of storm light above, bubbles and particles drifting, awe without horror
motion_prompt: The camera drifts underwater as the whale approaches and the mouth opens slowly, bubbles stream past, light shafts flicker from the storm above
vfx: underwater caustics, bubble streams, soft bioluminescent particles
sfx: underwater pressure rumble, muffled thunder, massive gentle whoosh

text: Jonas foi engolido. Por três dias e três noites, ele ficou dentro daquele peixe enorme.
image_prompt: Surreal interior of a vast whale belly like a dark living cavern, Jonah tiny on a wet ledge, soft bioluminescent glow along the walls, water pooled below, mysterious and safe for children
motion_prompt: Slow push into the cavernous whale interior reveals tiny Jonah on a ledge, walls pulse gently with living light, water ripples below
vfx: bioluminescent wall glow and drifting moisture particles
sfx: deep living heartbeat ambience, dripping water, distant muffled ocean

text: Senhor, eu fugi. Eu errei. Do fundo deste lugar escuro, eu clamo a ti com o coração.
image_prompt: Medium shot of Jonah praying inside the glowing fish belly, clasped hands, soft stylized tears, bioluminescent cartoon cave, Disney Pixar look.
motion_prompt: Jonah kneels, presses his hands together, and looks upward through tears of relief, soft light pulses on the walls
vfx: gentle pulsing biolight responding to his prayer
sfx: soft prayer breath, dripping water, warm low resonance

text: Eu lembrei de ti. A salvação vem do Senhor. Eu quero obedecer de verdade.
image_prompt: Close-up of Jonah's humble hopeful smile in soft bioluminescent light, stylized animated face, simplified water sheen on beard, Disney Pixar look, not photoreal.
motion_prompt: A tear slips down Jonah's cheek as a small hopeful smile forms, his eyes stay lifted
sfx: single water drop, soft inhale, warm ambient tone

text: Então o Senhor falou ao peixe. E o peixe vomitou Jonas em terra firme.
image_prompt: Low-angle beach landing as Jonah is gently deposited onto wet sand by a massive whale at the shoreline, morning light breaking through clouds, family-friendly and wondrous not gross
motion_prompt: The whale releases Jonah onto the sand, he rolls safely onto the beach, morning light breaks through clouds over the water
vfx: morning light break through clouds and sea spray halo
sfx: massive water surge, soft sand thud, gulls, relieved ocean hush

text: Jonas caiu na areia, cansado e molhado. Mas ele estava vivo. Deus tinha lhe dado outra chance.
image_prompt: Wide beach shot of soaked Jonah sitting up on wet sand, huge gentle whale departing into glittering morning sea behind him, fresh air and hope in the color script
motion_prompt: Jonah sits up slowly on the sand while the whale turns and swims away into sparkling morning water
vfx: sparkling morning sea glitter and soft mist
sfx: shore waves, distant whale call fading, wet cloth drip

text: Jonas, levante-se outra vez. Vá a Nínive e anuncie a mensagem que eu te dei.
image_prompt: Medium shot of Jonah standing on the beach looking upward into warm morning light, wet robe clinging, renewed resolve on his face, ocean behind him
motion_prompt: Jonah stands, lifts his face into the light, then turns inland with renewed purpose
vfx: warm divine morning light wash
sfx: soft wind, resonant warm presence, footsteps starting on sand

text: Desta vez eu vou. Mesmo com medo no peito, eu vou até Nínive.
image_prompt: Tracking shot of Jonah walking a long dusty road toward a massive ancient city skyline, robe drying in the sun, determined stride, layered desert landscape
motion_prompt: Camera tracks beside Jonah as he walks with firm steps toward the distant city, dust lifts from his sandals, robe flutters
sfx: steady footsteps, dry wind, distant city hum growing

text: Nínive era tão grande que levava dias para atravessar. Jonas entrou pelos portões e começou a falar.
image_prompt: Extreme-wide establishing shot of enormous Nineveh with towering walls, busy streets, banners and markets, tiny Jonah entering the gate, epic scale with clear depth layers
motion_prompt: Slow aerial drift over Nineveh's walls reveals tiny Jonah entering the gate, banners flutter and crowds move through the streets
vfx: heat haze over stone walls and subtle dust motes in sunbeams
sfx: city gate bustle, market murmur, banners in wind

text: Daqui a quarenta dias, Nínive será destruída! Mudem de caminho enquanto ainda há tempo!
image_prompt: Wide street scene of Jonah proclaiming with raised hands in a crowded Nineveh square, people stopping to listen, market stalls and stone architecture framing the action
motion_prompt: Jonah steps into the square and proclaims with raised hands, people stop and turn toward him in a ripple of attention
sfx: crowd hush spreading, footsteps stopping, tense city ambience

text: Para a surpresa de Jonas, o povo ouviu. Eles acreditaram em Deus e ficaram tristes pelo mal que tinham feito.
image_prompt: Medium crowd reaction shot of Ninevite families looking moved and serious, some kneeling, soft remorseful expressions, Jonah visible blurred in background, warm compassionate lighting
motion_prompt: People kneel and bow their heads in a wave of repentance, Jonah watches in stunned silence from behind
sfx: soft weeping, cloth kneeling, quiet city wind

text: A notícia chegou até o rei. Ele se levantou do trono, tirou o manto real e se humilhou diante de Deus.
image_prompt: Over-shoulder palace shot of the King of Nineveh rising from a golden throne and removing his crimson robe, servants watching in awe, shafts of light through high windows
motion_prompt: The king stands, removes his royal robe, and kneels on the stone floor as light pours through the windows
vfx: volumetric palace light shafts
sfx: robe fabric drop, throne room hush, soft knee on stone

text: Que cada um se arrependa do mal. Quem sabe Deus se arrepende e ainda nos poupa?
image_prompt: Close-up of the humbled King of Nineveh kneeling without his crown, sincere pleading eyes, soft window light on his face, regal yet repentant
motion_prompt: The king looks upward with sincere pleading eyes and speaks softly, his hands open in surrender
sfx: quiet palace ambience, soft breath, distant city bells

text: Deus viu o que eles fizeram. Ele viu que mudaram de verdade. E não destruiu a cidade.
image_prompt: Aerial view of Nineveh at peaceful sunset, people gathered in open courtyards, warm orange light replacing earlier tension, banners still, city breathing with relief
motion_prompt: Camera drifts over the calmed city as warm sunset light spreads, people gather quietly in courtyards
vfx: warm sunset god-rays washing over the city
sfx: relieved crowd murmur, soft evening wind, distant hopeful music bed tone

text: Eu sabia! Eu sabia que tu és Deus bondoso e compassivo. Por isso eu fugi no começo!
image_prompt: Medium shot of Jonah sitting outside the city under a makeshift shelter, arms crossed, conflicted frustrated expression, Nineveh glowing peacefully in the background
motion_prompt: Jonah crosses his arms and looks toward the peaceful city with frustrated conflict, then glances upward
sfx: dry wind, cloth shelter flap, distant peaceful city

text: Jonas ficou aborrecido. Ele queria justiça dura. Mas o coração de Deus queria misericórdia.
image_prompt: Close-up of Jonah frowning under the shelter while a soft plant grows beside him, contrasting cool shade and warm city glow behind, emotional interior conflict
motion_prompt: Jonah scowls then notices a leafy plant growing quickly beside him, his face softens for a moment
vfx: magical rapid plant growth with soft green sparkles
sfx: soft plant unfurling, breeze, quiet wonder tone

text: Deus fez crescer uma planta para dar sombra a Jonas. No dia seguinte, a planta secou de repente.
image_prompt: Wide shot of Jonah under a withering plant at harsh noon, bright heat haze around him, dried leaves falling, Nineveh still peaceful in the distance
motion_prompt: The plant withers and drops leaves while Jonah flinches from the sudden heat, heat haze intensifies
vfx: heat haze and crumbling leaf particles
sfx: leaves crisping, hot wind, frustrated sigh

text: Tu tens pena desta planta. E eu não teria pena de Nínive, com tanta gente e tantas crianças?
image_prompt: Over-shoulder of Jonah looking toward glowing Nineveh while warm divine light surrounds him, no God figure, compassionate atmosphere, city full of tiny family figures in the distance
motion_prompt: Warm light surrounds Jonah as he looks from the dead plant to the living city, his posture slowly softens
vfx: soft compassionate divine light enveloping Jonah and the distant city
sfx: warm resonant voice presence, soft wind, distant children laughing faintly

text: Jonas entendeu. O amor de Deus é maior do que a nossa raiva.
image_prompt: Final medium shot of Jonah standing peacefully overlooking Nineveh at golden sunset, gentle smile of understanding beginning, warm wind in his robe, hopeful cinematic ending frame
motion_prompt: Jonah breathes out and begins to smile softly as warm sunset light settles across his face
vfx: golden sunset particles drifting in the wind
sfx: warm evening wind, distant peaceful city

text: Esse amor alcança até quem a gente acha que não merece. E também alcança a gente.
image_prompt: Intimate close-up of Jonah's peaceful understanding smile at golden sunset, soft wind moving a few hair strands, Nineveh bokeh lights behind him, warm hopeful finale
motion_prompt: Jonah holds the gentle smile, eyes soft with understanding, as golden light flares softly and the frame settles
vfx: soft golden light flare and drifting dust motes
sfx: hopeful resolve ambience, soft wind, quiet heartfelt hold
